notes: Module abstracts MT5 login + storage. Uses F006 credentials.store_secret under namespace 'broker_mt5'. Server allow-list, alias regex, rate-limit 5/min/process, MT5 Windows-only short-circuit on macOS/Linux. Password never touches logs; test_connection response never carries the password field.
review_criteria: Security reviews: password-in-logs regression, allow-list enforcement, rate-limit enforcement, DELETE auth, non-localhost gate on /api/broker/*
Live-warning route stays open (no install-token gate) because it's read before setup completes
